name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or rendering issue on the MUB-1R website
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **Browser:** [e.g., Chrome 120, Safari 17]
- **Device:** [e.g., Desktop, iPhone 15, Pixel 8]
- **Screen width:** [e.g., 1440px, 390px]
- **OS:** [e.g., macOS 14, Windows 11, iOS 17]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.

- [ ] I have checked the existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have tested on the [live site](https://mub-1r.com)
